summary: RBP App Shell - Complete E2E testing of all 4 shell modes (Public, Auth, Portal, Admin) and 70+ routes. All backend APIs and frontend routes working correctly.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for shell preview
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 shell modes verified: Public (header with 9 nav + 3 utility, footer with 4 columns), Auth (centered card with minimal header/footer), Portal (sidebar with 10 nav items), Admin (scaffold with Frappe Desk notice). All placeholder pages show correct route badge, section label, and shell badge. Navigation highlighting works correctly. Backend APIs /api/health, /api/navigation, /api/routes all return correct data.

backend_api_tests.health_endpoint: PASS - returns status ok, app rbp_app, version 0.1.0
backend_api_tests.navigation_endpoint: PASS - returns 9 primary nav items and 3 utility items
backend_api_tests.routes_endpoint: PASS - returns all 4 route categories (public, auth, portal, admin)

frontend_shell_tests.public_shell: PASS - header with 9 nav items, 3 utility items, footer with 4 column groups
frontend_shell_tests.auth_shell: PASS - centered card with minimal header/footer, tested /login, /register, /join, /forgot-password, /reset-password, /verify-account
frontend_shell_tests.portal_shell: PASS - sidebar with 10 nav items, content area, tested /portal/dashboard, /portal/membership, /portal/library, /portal/billing
frontend_shell_tests.admin_shell: PASS - scaffold with Frappe Desk notice, tested /admin, /admin/services, /admin/users

navigation_tests.active_highlighting: PASS - nav items correctly highlighted when active
navigation_tests.nav_click_navigation: PASS - clicking nav items navigates to correct routes
navigation_tests.cta_buttons: PASS - Join CTA and Hero CTA work correctly
navigation_tests.portal_sidebar: PASS - sidebar navigation works with active state
